_meta.purpose: Canonical mood catalog. The mood-influence field on activities (and similar mood-source state) stores values from this catalog as English IDs. UI rendering looks up the localized label via shared/languages/<lang>.json — the keys are the IDs verbatim (e.g. 'pleased', 'exhausted'). Adding a new mood: append an entry here, then add the same id as a key to each languages/*.json with the localized translation.

schema.id: canonical English identifier — used as the value of mood_influence and current_feeling
